shared_case_surface: bounded repair and reanchor cases that keep target seam, owner-boundary preservation, ambiguity reduction, scope control, and trail reviewability inspectable on the same follow-through surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same bounded-repair question, keeps the target seam and repair trail jointly inspectable, and still covers honest bounded repair, widening-shaped failure, ambiguity-reducing reanchor, and trail-gap pressure without collapsing the bundle into final object quality or retrospective route-justification review.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the named repair seam before reading the final repair note
owner-boundary preservation remains visible without private operational context
ambiguity reduction stays distinct from final quality proof
the public repair read stays weaker than final owner proof
